channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Kunio-kun and Double Dragon creator Yoshihisa Kishimoto dies at age 64
item.content:encoded:
Son confirms creator's passing on Twitter.

Yoshihisa Kishimoto, creator of the Kunio-kun and Double Dragon series, has died at age 64, his son confirmed on Twitter.

“This is the son of Yoshihisa Kishimoto, the director of Kunio-kun,” the son replied in a tweet posted by the Kunio-kun series’ official account. “I’m sharing this notice to inform you that my father passed away on April 2, 2026. Please feel free to contact me at any time for further details. I deeply appreciate all the information shared with Kunio-kun fans over the years. Thank you for your continued support.”

Kishimoto began his game designing career at Data East, where he worked on Cobra Command and Road Blaster, before moving to Technos Japan, where he created Renegade (Nekketsu Kouha Kunio-kun) and Double Dragon. In recent years, he served as director on Double Dragon IV, as well as a collaborative director on Stay Cool, Kobayashi-san!: A River City Ransom Story.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/kunio-kun-and-double-dragon-creator-yoshihisa-kishimoto-dies-at-age-64
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: LEVEL-5 Vision 2026 Craftsmanship set for April 10
item.content:encoded:
Latest news and updates on multiple titles from LEVEL-5.

LEVEL-5 will host LEVEL-5 Vision 2026 Craftsmanship on April 10 at 6:00 a.m. PT / 8:00 a.m. ET / 21:00 JST, the company announced. You will be able to watch it on YouTube.

The broadcast will feature the latest news and updates on multiple titles from LEVEL-5. English and Traditional Chinese subtitles will be available.

Stay tuned.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/level-5-vision-2026-craftsmanship-set-for-april-10
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
